songs.title: Wake Me Up When September Ends
feed: “Wake Me Up When September Ends” by Green Day climbs inside the top 5 of Personal Hot 100, rising 4 spots to #3.
“Wake Me Up When September Ends” by Green Day is the #1 best selling song in Personal Hot 100 this week with 38 sales units.
“Wake Me Up When September Ends” by Green Day is the #1 most streamed song in Personal Hot 100 this week with 39 streams units.
“Wake Me Up When September Ends” by Green Day is the #1 overall units gainer in Personal Hot 100 this week with 299,726 total units.
